description_long: This wallet features a rectangular shape with a structured form and a visually striking woven pattern on its main surfaces. The front and back panels display a geometric motif in black and beige, reminiscent of traditional basket weaving, bordered by a solid brown band at the base. The sides are slim and finished in a smooth brown material, with visible stitching along the edges, suggesting careful craftsmanship. The top edge appears to have a subtle seam, possibly indicating an opening or closure mechanism, though no hardware is visible. The overall design is both functional and decorative, blending modern and artisanal aesthetics. The wallet is compact, likely intended for carrying cash, cards, and small personal items.
description: Rectangular wallet with a black and beige geometric woven pattern, brown trim, and slim profile. Features visible stitching and a solid brown base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full geometric woven pattern in black and beige with a brown base and trim.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the slim profile, brown stitched edge, and no visible closure hardware.
description_view_2: Back view, identical to the front, with the same woven pattern and brown base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the slim brown stitched edge seen in view 1.
attribute_decorative_pattern: Geometric woven pattern in black and beige, forming circular and diamond motifs across the main panels.
